posts.title: Diversity, Equity and Inclusion in Startups
posts.summary: DEI in Startups: First of all, I suggest that you read my piece on Inclusive Entrepreneurship that discusses the ‘missing venture founders’, who are people who would like to start new businesses, but continue to be seriously disadvantaged and hampered in their aspirations. The categories of such people include, but are not limited to: women, […] The post Diversity, Equity and Inclusion in Startups appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
tags: equity and inclusion for all startups
